channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Chancellor outlines UK strategy to retain technology firms and boost AI and quantum computing
item.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has expressed her determination to prevent leading British technology companies and scientists from relocating overseas. Speaking at the National Quantum Computing Centre in O...

item.title: Iran’s Strategic Resilience in the Current Conflict
item.description: The article analyzes the ongoing asymmetric conflict involving Iran, highlighting that despite Iran suffering significant civilian and infrastructure losses, it demonstrates a higher capacity for endu...

item.title: Israel Shuts Down Leviathan and Karish Gas Fields Amid Regional Security Threats
item.description: Since the onset of the ongoing conflict involving Iran, Israel has suspended operations at its major offshore natural gas fields, Leviathan and Karish, located in the eastern Mediterranean. These prec...

item.title: Top Scorers of Tanzania Premier League Compete for Golden Boot
item.description: The 2025/2026 Tanzania Premier League season is giving fans plenty excitement, especially with the race for the Golden Boot. DR Congo striker Fabrice Ngoye from Namungo FC is leading the chart with ei...

item.title: Sindh Building Control Authority clarifies status of Gul Plaza after Jan 17 fire
item.description: The Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) has confirmed that Gul Plaza was built in violation of its approved building plan but shifted responsibility away from the authority, noting that the revise...

item.title: 10 Everyday Foods That Help Improve Sleep Naturally
item.description: If you dey struggle to catch better sleep at night, e no always mean say na stress or phone dey worry you. Sometimes na wetin you chop during the day dey affect your sleep. Your body need nutrients li...

item.title: Zambales congresswoman apologizes and withdraws proposal to rename President Ramon Magsaysay State University
item.description: Zambales Second District Representative Doris “Bing” Maniquiz announced that she will withdraw House Bill 8520, which sought to rename the President Ramon Magsaysay State University (PRMSU) to Zambale...

item.title: President Ruto Launches Western Kenya Development Tour with Kakamega Airstrip Upgrade
item.description: President William Ruto has kicked off a five-day tour across Western Kenya focusing on development and infrastructure improvements. His visit started in Kakamega County where he personally inspected o...

item.title: Long-running Woolloongabba karaoke restaurant shuts after 33 years
item.description: Ben’s Vietnamese and Chinese Restaurant, a long-standing favourite in Woolloongabba, has closed its doors as of 1 March 2026. The closure comes after 33 years of serving locals and visitors, with the ...

item.title: Tennessee minors file lawsuit against xAI over alleged sexualised image generation by Grok
item.description: Three plaintiffs from Tennessee, including two minors, have initiated legal proceedings against Elon Musk's company xAI, asserting that its Grok image generator produced sexually explicit images using...

item.title: Eight women killed, dozens injured in Rahim Yar Khan BISP aid distribution accident
item.description: At least eight women lost their lives and more than 80 others were injured when the roof of a shop collapsed during the distribution of Benazir Income Support Programme (BISP) cash assistance in Rahim...

item.title: Delhi HC orders takedown of defamatory content targeting Hardeep Puri’s daughter
item.description: On March 17, 2026, the Delhi High Court issued directions to social media platforms and online intermediaries to remove or block access in India to posts linking Himayani Puri, daughter of Union Minis...

item.title: Jannik Sinner wins Indian Wells after early preparation in the heat
item.description: Italian tennis star Jannik Sinner has claimed his first Indian Wells title, crediting his victory to arriving a week early to acclimatise and train under the desert heat. The world No 2 has previously...

item.title: Uttar Pradesh mandates expiry and laying dates on eggs from April 1 to ensure public safety
item.description: The Uttar Pradesh government has issued a new order mandating that all eggs sold in the state must carry both the date on which they were laid and the expiry date, effective from April 1, 2026. Eggs t...

item.title: Technological Features Make Iranian Shahed Drones Difficult to Counter
item.description: Iranian-designed Shahed drones have emerged as a significant challenge in Middle Eastern conflicts due to their low cost, stealth features, and advanced navigation capabilities. Designed to explode on...

item.title: Calgary allocates $33 million to expand affordable housing for Indigenous residents
item.description: The City of Calgary has announced a $33‑million investment to support an Indigenous Housing Program aimed at increasing access to affordable housing for First Nations, Métis, and Inuit residents. City...

item.title: Picsart launches AI agent marketplace to help creators automate content and e-commerce tasks
item.description: Picsart, the AI-powered design platform with over 130 million users globally, has launched an AI agent marketplace to assist creators in automating various content and e-commerce tasks. This marketpla...

item.title: Tanzania Prepares Amateur Boxers for 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow
item.description: The Boxing Federation of Tanzania (BFT) is confident that Tanzanian amateur boxers are fully prepared to take part in the 2026 Commonwealth Games, set to happen from July 23 to August 2 in Glasgow, Sc...

item.title: LTFRB announces fare increases for public transportation starting March 19, 2026
item.description: Starting March 19, 2026, Filipinos will experience higher fares for almost all forms of public transportation due to rising fuel prices caused by the Middle East conflict. The Land Transportation Fran...

item.title: Owoseni Urges Strong Rule of Law and Good Governance for State Police Success
item.description: Fatai Owoseni, former Lagos Commissioner of Police, don talk say to make any state police work well for Nigeria, dem gats strengthen rule of law, dey follow good governance, plus proper funding. E yan...
